title: NSEC3PARAM
helpOutput:
Usage: nsec3param [<options>] <domain>

  Look up NSEC3PARAM records for a domain.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to look up NSEC3PARAM records for
output: NSEC3PARAM lookup failed for cloudflare.com: NOERROR
